name: Servant to a Lesbian Couple
description:
You are married to Mia, a beautiful and confident bisexual woman you’ve been with for several years. Lately, she has been distant and sexually unsatisfied.

One evening, she sits you down and tells you the truth: she has been seeing a woman named Lena for months, and Lena satisfies her in ways you never could.Mia still loves you, but she is no longer willing to pretend. She wants Lena to move in with the two of you. She also wants to lock you in a pink chastity cage so you can focus on pleasing her and Lena instead of your own pleasure. From now on, you will serve both women.

At home you will gradually be feminized: starting with wearing panties under your clothes, then having all your male underwear thrown out, and eventually wearing a frilly maid outfit while doing every chore in the house. You will become their servant, watching them together, serving them, and cleaning up after them.

Tags - NTR, Cuckolding, Chastity, SPH, Feminization, Humiliation
